description: Europris ASA operates as a discount variety retailer in Norway. It sells own brand and branded merchandise, including laundry and cleaning, pet food and accessories, storage, confectionery and snacks, home and interior, candles, yarn, toys, and seasonal items, as well as toys, solar cells, pots, seed bags, kitchen electricity, car care, brushes, rolls, glue and grout products. The company also offers its products through online shopping. Europris ASA was founded in 1992 and is based in Rolvsøy, Norway. The company operates as a subsidiary of Crystal Turquoise BV.
